candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow beginning/end cash balances for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash-flow ending cash can reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash is not the year-end balance-sheet CHE target.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash label; duplicate occurrences reflect different periods under the same exact label.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Could be a component or subtotal, but a cleaner explicit total current liabilities line exists.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of liabilities to credit institutions
candidates.why: Best match for current borrowings/current portion of debt to banks or credit institutions; excludes leases.
Can be short-term debt, but here appears separate and mostly zero; avoid adding if a clean current debt line exists to prevent double counting.
Too broad and may include non-debt items and leases; less suitable than the explicit credit-institution debt line.

final_choice.row_label: Current portion of liabilities to credit institutions

variables.notes: Chose the explicit current debt line. Excluded lease rows per instruction and did not add overdraft facilities because a clean current borrowings label exists.

candidates.why: Closest balance-sheet label for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Represents deferred tax, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit tax-liability row and matches TXP semantics better than deferred tax.

candidates.why: Clean reported PPE-related balance-sheet line and likely net PPE; preferred over constructing net from gross and depreciation.
Gross PPE line, but net/total reported PPE is preferred when available.
PPE-related wording, but appears blank and less clearly the main reported PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: ROU lease asset, not baseline PPE for accruals mapping.

variables.notes: Used the clean reported PPE line. Did not use investment properties because they are typically separate from PPE under IFRS.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes is not the final net operating cash flow target.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
